name: Unity Software Inc.
summary: Unity Software Inc. is a technology company that provides a real-time 3D development platform used to create, run, and monetize interactive, real-time 2D and 3D content. Its platform is widely used in gaming and other industries. Unity offers tools for content creation, runtime solutions, and monetization services enabling developers to build and operate interactive experiences across multiple platforms.
